meaning: 马什哈德[伊朗东北部城市](即麦什德
examples: The foundation also receives generous contributions from the millions of pilgrims who visit the Mashhad shrine each year.
Emergency shelters are also being airlifted to Mashhad in eastern Iran, some of it provided by the United Kingdom.
The killer was arrested last year in the north-eastern city of Mashhad, according to the main reformist newspaper Norouz.
